sn8.1:1.0.1: Thus have I heard.On one occasion the Venerable Vangisa was dwelling at Aḷavi at the Aggaḷava Shrine together with his preceptor, the Venerable Nigrodhakappa.Now on that occasion the Venerable Vangisa, newly ordained, not long gone forth, had been left behind as a caretaker of the dwelling.
